display.purpose: Top-level app identity and major page titles.

body.purpose: Forms, row text, metadata, and compact product copy.

shadows.name: login-logo-glow
shadows.purpose: Local identity flourish for the login logo only.

motion.name: state-feedback
motion.purpose: Button, selection, focus, and sheet feedback only.

breakpoints.name: mobile-first
breakpoints.value: Flutter adaptive layout, primary target phone width

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for login, upload, and create flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #35D07F; color: #FFFFFF; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; min-height: 48px; font: 700 14px system-ui, Roboto, San Francisco, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.04); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #35D07F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Song Row
components.description: Core tappable row for song playback and song actions.
components.html:
♪
Song titleArtist name
components.css: .ds-song-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 86px; padding: 10px; background: #191C1A; color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 8px; font-family: system-ui, Roboto, San Francisco, sans-serif; } .ds-song-art { width: 66px; height: 66px; display: grid; place-items: center; flex: 0 0 auto; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(53, 208, 127, 0.16); color: #35D07F; font-size: 24px; } .ds-song-copy { min-width: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; flex: 1; } .ds-song-copy strong { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-song-copy span { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.66); font-size: 14px; } .ds-icon-btn { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #FFFFFF; cursor: pointer; } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #35D07F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Persistent bottom navigation for Home, Library, and Profile.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; min-height: 64px; padding: 6px 8px; background: #191C1A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: system-ui, Roboto, San Francisco, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { min-width: 72px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 8px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); text-align: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: rgba(53, 208, 127, 0.18); color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 700; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #35D07F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Material form field with label, hint, icon, validation, and accent focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: system-ui, Roboto, San Francisco, sans-serif; } .ds-field span { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-field input { min-height: 48px; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.38); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: #FFFFFF; font: 400 16px system-ui, Roboto, San Francisco, sans-serif; } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.62); } .ds-field input:focus { outline: 0; border-bottom-color: #35D07F; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 #35D07F; }

components.name: Theme Option Tile
components.description: Settings tile for choosing one of the app themes.
components.html:
Studio Dark

Dark, neutral, and focused

●
components.css: .ds-theme-tile { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 14px; border-radius: 8px; background: #191C1A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: system-ui, Roboto, San Francisco, sans-serif; } .ds-theme-swatch { display: flex; overflow: hidden; width: 56px; height: 56px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 8px; } .ds-theme-swatch span { flex: 1; } .ds-theme-swatch span:nth-child(1) { background: #101211; } .ds-theme-swatch span:nth-child(2) { background: #191C1A; } .ds-theme-swatch span:nth-child(3) { background: #35D07F; } .ds-theme-tile strong { display: block; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-theme-tile p { margin: 3px 0 0; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.66); font-size: 14px; } .ds-radio { margin-left: auto; color: #35D07F; }

narrative.overview:
Sonique should feel like a compact music shelf that belongs to the user: familiar, direct, and focused on listening rather than promotion. The app can borrow standard music-app structure, but it must stay quieter than a commercial streaming clone. Screens should help users browse, play, save, and manage songs without ornamental complexity.

The visual system is a restrained Material 3 product UI. It uses flat tonal layering, 8px corners, system typography, and a small accent budget. Green marks primary action, selection, and current state; it is not a decorative wash across every surface.
keyCharacteristics: Compact music-app familiarity with Flutter Material controls.
Restrained accent color used for action and state only.
Flat, tonal surfaces instead of decorative shadows.
Mobile-first density with short labels and predictable affordances.
Minimal motion focused on feedback, never page choreography.

rules.name: The Accent Budget Rule
rules.body: Studio Green should stay under 10 percent of any normal app screen. If the screen reads green before it reads music, it is too much.

rules.name: The Theme Separation Rule
rules.body: Studio Dark, Studio Light, and Midnight are separate theme families. Do not blend their accent colors casually.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: Use one system sans family for UI labels, data, actions, and headings. Do not add display fonts to the app shell.

rules.name: The Flat Shelf Rule
rules.body: Cards and rows sit on tonal layers at rest. Do not add wide soft shadows to song cards, playlist tiles, navigation bars, or settings tiles.

dos: Do keep green restrained and tied to primary actions, selected state, focus, and current music feedback.
Do preserve the 8px radius system for app controls and repeated rows.
Do use flat tonal layers for cards, shelves, bottom navigation, and settings tiles.
Do keep motion minimal and performance-safe, with transitions only for state feedback.
Do keep the app recognizable as a simple music product with Home, Library, Profile, playlist, and playback patterns.
donts: Don't create an over-saturated green palette or a screen that feels like a full Spotify clone with fewer features.
Don't add heavy animation, elaborate page transitions, decorative motion, or visual effects that could reduce performance on mobile devices.
Don't add complex premium-streaming patterns that the product does not actually support.
Don't pair a 1px border with a soft wide shadow on the same card or button.
Don't use large rounded cards, glass panels, gradient text, or decorative stripe backgrounds.
